name: Seedance Wizard
author: Seedance Team
description: AI video creation wizard inside ComfyUI. Upload an image, AI analyzes it (style/mood/camera), then generates previews and complete videos with 18 models via Seedance Studio. Non-blocking async generation with real-time progress.

nodes.SeedanceWizardNode: Main wizard node — dual-mode (sidebar interactive + pipeline) AI video generation with 18 models
nodes.SeedanceApiKeyNode: Optional standalone API key input node
nodes.SeedanceImageInputNode: Pipeline helper — explicit image passthrough for workflow clarity
